description: Registered passenger-car AWD/4WD summary with ES|QL-computed percentages. Use when user asks AWD/4WD count or share. 1 = one driven axle, 2 = AWD/4WD.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL driven_axles = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTraekkendeAkslerListe | STATS total_registered_cars = COUNT(*), known_drivetrain_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE driven_axles >= 1 AND driven_axles <= 4, one_driven_axle_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE driven_axles == 1, awd_4wd_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE driven_axles == 2, other_known_drivetrain_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE driven_axles >= 3 AND driven_axles <= 4 | EVAL awd_share_of_total_pct = ROUND(awd_4wd_cars * 100.0 / total_registered_cars, 1), awd_share_of_known_drivetrain_pct = ROUND(awd_4wd_cars * 100.0 / known_drivetrain_cars, 1), one_driven_axle_share_of_known_drivetrain_pct = ROUND(one_driven_axle_cars * 100.0 / known_drivetrain_cars, 1) | LIMIT 1
